{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Blackflame technique
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|A [[Blackflame technique]] left veins of black twisting through flesh and dissolved the victim from the inside.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c10">''Dreadgod'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]]'s [[Blackflame technique]] shuddered.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c11">''Waybound'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
